events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: PPE selection, respirator wrong cartridge color (ID). This means the respirator has the wrong cartridge color for the hazard/contaminant. Respirator cartridges are color-coded per NIOSH/OSHA. Wrong cartridge = wrong protection, non-compliant. At rough-complete stage. Decision: fail. Risk: high (wrong respiratory protection can lead to inhalation exposure). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.

  "rationale": "Respirator cartridges are color-coded by NIOSH/OSHA to match specific contaminant classes. Using the wrong cartridge color means the respirator may not filter the actual hazard, leaving the worker unprotected. Under OSHA 1910 Subpart I, PPE must be selected and used correctly for the identified hazard; incorrect cartridge selection is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition.",
